Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, here are the neighbor atoms of atom index 16 (Nitrogen):

(Note: The view clearly shows covalent bonds connecting atom 16 to atoms 15, 17, and 14.)

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 16 (element: N). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
